title: Images from Ayanami Rei Ikusei Keikaku Book CD
display_title: Images from Ayanami Rei Ikusei Keikaku Book CD
wikitext:
[]: Images from Ayanami Rei Ikusei Keikaku Book CD             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 25, 2006 7:36 pm http://www.evamonkey.com/ayanami_rei_ikusei_keikaku_book_cd.zip I got a book for the Ayanami Rei Ikusei Keikaku game a while back. It came with a CD-ROM containing among other things a bunch of images. I converted them from ridiculously huge bitmaps to fairly high quality jpegs. I hope you enjoy them.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Aug 25, 2006 10:41 pm I've seen most of these, but not at this resolution (and I think that the website where I saw them is dead). Good work. And everything is more fun with hotsprings. By the way, wasn't there a version of that game that had an unlockable Asuka version? How come I've never seen any screencaps of the "Asuka version" before?

It came with a CD-ROM containing among other things a bunch of images. I converted them from ridiculously huge bitmaps to fairly high quality jpegs. I hope you enjoy them.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Aug 25, 2006 10:41 pm I've seen most of these, but not at this resolution (and I think that the website where I saw them is dead). Good work. And everything is more fun with hotsprings. By the way, wasn't there a version of that game that had an unlockable Asuka version? How come I've never seen any screencaps of the "Asuka version" before?
